title: senna glutinosa
intro: Senna glutinosa, also known as cassia tora, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, widely distributed in tropical and subtropical regions. The medicinal properties of Senna glutinosa lie in its ability to act as a laxative and purgative, due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides, which stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and lower cholesterol levels, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Senna glutinosa can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects and improve overall well-being.
